title: geissois ternata var. glabrior
intro: Geissois ternata var. glabrior is a plant species within the family Cunoniaceae, also known as a variety of the more broadly recognized Geissois ternata. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Geissois ternata var. glabrior include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
